stages.log: Find a Diving Bag at the seamstress (Lane shops).
Equip the Diving Bag on your head and dive in the sea.
Travel north of the slope into the orc caves.
Defeat the Orc Warlord at the back of the third cave.
Find a way across the lake to the central island.
Travel north through the mine maze.
Plant the banner at the peak.
Enter the swamp maze south of the swamp.
Return with the Swamp Horror's Heart.
Speak with Father Verim at the church.
Search the church basement for clues.
Defeat the Restless Phantom in the graveyard.
Return the Ghostly Locket to the priest.
Visit the Realtor in the south alley.
Take the assignment from Guildmaster Goran (#1).
Complete the task in the field.
Take the assignment from Guildmaster Goran (#2).
Complete the task in the field.
Take the assignment from Guildmaster Goran (#3).
Complete the task in the field.
Take the assignment from Guildmaster Goran (#4).
Complete the task in the field.
Take the assignment from Guildmaster Goran (#5).
Complete the task in the field.
Take the assignment from Guildmaster Goran (#6).
Complete the task in the field.
Take the assignment from Guildmaster Goran (#7).
Complete the task in the field.
Take the assignment from Guildmaster Goran (#8).
Complete the task in the field.
Take the assignment from Guildmaster Goran (#9).
Complete the task in the field.
Take the assignment from Guildmaster Goran (#10).
Complete the task in the field.
Take the assignment from Guildmaster Goran (#11).
Complete the task in the field.
Take the assignment from Guildmaster Goran (#12).
Complete the task in the field.
Receive the Guild Signet from Goran.
Speak with Guildmaster Goran about the abandoned subway.
Recover the master ignition rune from the Ancient Mine.
Return to the guild to bring the line online.
Climb each of the 13 floors of the Spire.
Defeat the wing guardians on every level.
Reach the top and claim the legendary set.
Search the classrooms for the lost book.
Travel north of the beach to the dragon cave.
Defeat the Elder Dragon and bring back a Dragon Scale.
